---
title: "Aakanksha Singh"
image: "../../img/Aakanksha.png"
abstract: "PhD Student"
page-layout: custom
date: 04-01-2022
about:
  template: trestles
comments: false
format:
  html:
    css: style.scss
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-5}
\
\


<div class="vertical-line">
</div>

<div  class="content">

  <img src="../../img/Aakanksha.png" alt="Avatar"> 

  <center>
  <a class="button-linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/aakanksha-singh-a1b850139/" role="button"><i class="bi-linkedin"></i> Aakanksha Singh</a>
  <a class="button-page" href="https://aasingh2.github.io/" role="button"><i class="bi-file-person-fill"></i> CV</a>
  <a class="button-mail" role="button"><i class="bi-envelope"></i> a.singh | med.uni-frankfurt.de</a>
  </center>
  
</div>

:::


::: {.g-col-5}

<p>&emsp;</p>

# Aakanksha Singh

## Research
**PhD Student, Neurologisches Institut (Edinger Institut)**, Universitätsklinikum Frankfurt, Germany \
**MSc Student, GATAC- Malaria Group at LPHI**, University of Montpelier, France \
**MSc Student, Group of Social Evolution**, University of Lausanne, Switzerland \

## Education
**Erasmus Mundus Masters in Evolutionary Biology**, University of Groningen, the Netherlands  \
**University of Montpellier (France) BSc (Hons) Zoology**, University of Delhi, India


:::

:::
